---
title: "OhStem line follower checkpoint"
lang: vi
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
  docx:
    reference-doc: null
---

::: {.callout-note}
Status: `PREVIEW_ASSESSMENT`, `PREVIEW_ONLY`, `NON_CANONICAL`.
:::

## Media Prompt

Quan sat chuong trinh va du doan hanh vi robot.

![So do khoi OhStem dieu khien robot bam vach.](media_ohstem_q01_001.svg){fig-alt="So do khoi OhStem dieu khien robot bam vach."}

## Export Commands

```powershell
quarto render exam_export.qmd --to html
quarto render exam_export.qmd --to docx
```
